name: jltg-hide-and-seek
description: JLTG Hide & Seek map companion — backend (Overpass proxy).
//firebase-admin: Phase 43: server-side FCM sender for the seeker-close alert to a locked hider. OPTIONAL at runtime — server.js lazy-imports it and DEGRADES GRACEFULLY (createFcm disabled) when it's absent or FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT is unset, so `npm test` never needs it. Install on the Render web service to enable native push.
//devDependencies: Native-build-only — NOT needed for `npm test`. Run `npm install` before the Android build. Phase 39: Capacitor shell. Phase 40: the Doze spike plugins (@capacitor-community/background-geolocation = the free foreground-service watcher under test; @capacitor/local-notifications = firing an alert off a background tick). Phase 43: @capacitor/push-notifications = the hider's FCM device-token source. See docs/PHASE40_DOZE_SPIKE.md.
